summary: Comprehensive testing of AURA V3 new features - Distraction Monitor, Calendar View, Voice Processing, and Theme-aware styling. Backend: 24/24 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All V3 features working correctly with proper theme support across all pages.
critical_code_review_comments: V3 Distraction Monitor: All 5 categories (social_media, entertainment, news, shopping, other) work correctly with charts and AI analysis
V3 Calendar View: Week grid displays 7 days with prev/next navigation, shows tasks with deadlines and focus sessions
V3 Voice Processing: /api/voice/process endpoint correctly routes to task creation, chat, or brain_dump based on context parameter
Voice input buttons present on Chat page (data-testid='voice-input-chat') and Tasks Brain Dump (data-testid='voice-brain-dump')
Theme-aware styling: All pages (Tasks, Chat, Focus, Analytics, Goals, Calendar, Distractions, Settings) use CSS variables for full dark/moonlight mode support
Navigation: Sidebar correctly shows Calendar and Distractions links with proper icons
seed_data_creation: Admin user seeded on startup, test distractions logged during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All V3 features are working correctly. Distraction Monitor supports 5 categories with charts and AI insights. Calendar View shows 7-day week grid with navigation. Voice processing routes correctly based on context (task/chat/brain_dump). Voice input buttons use Web Speech API (browser-dependent). Theme system supports 3 modes (light/moonlight/dark) with CSS variables applied to all pages.

v3_distraction_monitor.post_distraction_social_media: PASS - Logs distraction with category, duration, app_name, notes
v3_distraction_monitor.get_distractions: PASS - Returns logs, total_minutes, by_category, daily_totals
v3_distraction_monitor.get_distractions_analysis: PASS - Returns AI analysis and tips
v3_distraction_monitor.frontend_page_loads: PASS - Stats cards, charts, log form all present
v3_distraction_monitor.frontend_log_distraction: PASS - Form opens, submits, and refreshes data

v3_calendar_view.get_calendar_week: PASS - Returns 7 days with correct structure
v3_calendar_view.get_calendar_events: PASS - Returns tasks with deadlines as events
v3_calendar_view.frontend_page_loads: PASS - Week grid with 7 days displayed

v3_voice_processing.post_voice_context_task: PASS - Creates a task from voice text
v3_voice_processing.post_voice_context_chat: PASS - Sends to AI advisor and returns response
v3_voice_processing.post_voice_context_brain_dump: PASS - Parses text into multiple tasks

theme_aware_styling.settings_page: PASS - Theme cards visible and clickable
